DotNetDiag HealthChecks

HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus

Generated from src/HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus/README.md.

Azure Service Bus Health Check

This health check verifies the ability to communicate with Azure Service Bus.

Breaking changes

In the prior releases, AzureEventHubHealthCheck was a part of DotNetDiag.HealthChecks.AzureServiceBus package. It had a dependency on not just Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus, but also Azure.Messaging.EventHubs. The packages have been split to avoid bringing unnecessary dependencies. The name of the new EveHub package is DotNetDiag.HealthChecks.Azure.Messaging.EventHubs.

Documentation, reference material, and changelog for the actively maintained DotNetDiag HealthChecks fork.

Maintained by DotNetDiag Maintainers / Project documentation
